text.title: Serverless IaC and Templates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (inventory, account, environments, tool standard)?

text.example: Constraint: AWS-only, small team, Python. Step 1 → SAM. Step 2 → SAM template + samconfig.toml with dev/staging/prod stages. Step 3 → per-function IAM scoped to single bucket. Step 4 → GitHub Actions validate + build + deploy + drift. Step 5 → cfn-nag in CI, fail on HIGH. Step 6 → end-to-end deploy verified. Config ready.
